'''Yang Earth Tiger''' is the 15th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 戊 Tsuchinoe (yang earth, the gaia-aligned face of autumn), and its branch is 寅 Tora, the [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's wood overcomes the stem's earth, the lower restraining the high.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Fire Ox]] (node 14) and [[Yin Earth Rabbit]] (node 16).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] — yang earth
* '''Branch:''' [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger (寅)]] — yang wood
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' autumn

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Fire Ox]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Earth Rabbit]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1061986}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
